title: Hire: Maurice Moss (telegram-bot-backend-specialist)
description: Alright, team! We need a sharp mind for this Telegram bot backend architecture role. No local skills perfectly match yet, but that’s no biggie. I’m bringing in Maurice Moss from The IT Crowd because his ability to explain complex tech and handle intricate backend systems will be invaluable here. This hire fills a critical gap, ensuring our bot’s technical foundation is solid and scalable. Let’s get this done right — that’s what she said!
